summary_en: Mid-term dividend raised ¥1.00 to ¥14.50/share for FY12/26. Full-year dividend forecast lifted to ¥28.00/share from prior estimate of ¥27.00/share. Rationale: core business tracking solid.
translation_en_brief: Value HR Co., Ltd. announced on 14 May 2026 that its board of directors resolved to revise upward the dividend forecast for the fiscal year ending 31 December 2026. The mid-term (second-quarter) dividend per share has been increased by ¥1.00 to ¥14.50, up from the prior forecast of ¥13.50. The full-year dividend forecast is therefore lifted to ¥28.00 per share, compared to the previous estimate of ¥27.00. The company cited solid performance of core operations as the basis for the revision. The year-end dividend remains unchanged at ¥13.50 per share.
